title: IC RegFin Legal, VERTICES act on Aquapulse Series A fundraise
description: Phoenix Marine Exports and Solution Private Limited, dba Aquapulse, has raised ₹25 crore from a Series A fundraise, led by NABVENTURES Limited who made the investment through their AgriSure Fund.IC RegFin Legal advised Aquapulse on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Puneet Shah (Partner) and Amrita Ghosh (Senior Associate).Puneet ShahVERTICES PARTNERS advised NABVENTURES on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Vishal Mehta (Partner), along with a team that included Nisha
